PreToolUse.command: echo 'Before committing, run /change-blast-radius or switch to the reviewer agent for a focused validation pass.'
PreToolUse.name: Pre-commit review hint

SessionStart.command: echo 'Use zelos for orchestration, zelos-explorer for code understanding, zelos-developer for edits, zelos-reviewer for validation, and zelos-documenter for docs.'
SessionStart.name: Session start hint
